_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-04-12): infra axis sub-SSOT created. 57 domains registered.

1.2.0 (2026-05-01): SA applied-tech bet #6 lora-mesh-learning-terminal registered (solar-powered LoRa mesh + e-paper Android terminal stack delivering CAPS-aligned curriculum + AI-tutor responses to South African rural learners at USD 8-15/learner-year all-in. Physical-limit anchors: Shannon-Hartley channel capacity at SF12 BW125 kHz (Shannon 1948) + LoRa link budget 162 dB (Semtech SX127x §4.1.1.3) + Friis 1946 free-space-path-loss + ITU-R P.833 vegetation attenuation + solar PV sizing for 50 W panel + 100 Wh LiFePO4 at Karoo 6 kWh/m^2/d (PVGIS-Africa) + e-paper bistable display 0 mW idle / 50-100 mW per refresh (Carsel-Hwang 2017) + per-learner cost USD 11-15/yr from BOM. 6 precursors: compute/5g-6g-network + compute/chip-architecture + cognitive/ai-multimodal + energy/solar-architecture + physics/electromagnetism + infra/calendar-time-geography. F-LORA-MVP-1..5 falsifier gates 2026-09-30 (attrition + uptime) + 2026-12-31 (link reliability + per-learner cost) + 2027-03-31 (DBE CAPS certification). Source: proposals/south-africa-applied-tech.md row 6. Design-by-physics per own#32, NOT n=6 force-fit. infra axis count 58 -> 59; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT.

domains.source_proposal: proposals/south-africa-applied-tech.md row 6 (SA applied-tech bet #6: LoRa mesh offline learning terminal)

physical_limit_anchors.shannon_hartley_capacity_bps_SF12_BW125: Shannon 1948 BSTJ 27 — C = B*log2(1+SNR); LoRa SF12 BW125 kHz with -20 dB SNR demodulator floor gives ~1.8 kbps theoretical; LoRa actual bit rate ~250 bps at SF12 (Semtech SX127x Table 13)
physical_limit_anchors.lora_link_budget_dB: Semtech SX127x datasheet §4.1.1.3 — 14 dBm Tx + -148 dBm Rx sensitivity = 162 dB link budget at SF12 BW125
physical_limit_anchors.friis_path_loss_868MHz: Friis 1946 IRE 34:254 — PL_dB(d) = 20*log10(4*pi*d*f/c); at 868 MHz 5 km PL = 105 dB; with 12 dBi antenna gain + 10 dB fade margin → 5+ km practical rural range
physical_limit_anchors.vegetation_attenuation: ITU-R P.833-9 — ~6 dB/km foliage loss at 868 MHz mid-density rural environment
physical_limit_anchors.etsi_duty_cycle_limit: ETSI EN 300 220-2 V3.2.1 — 1% duty cycle on 868 MHz ISM band; SA ICASA Reg 2014 Type 1 alignment
physical_limit_anchors.solar_pv_sizing: PVGIS-Africa SA-Karoo 6.0 kWh/m^2/day annual avg insolation; 50 W panel * 5.1 peak-sun-h * 0.85 system efficiency = 217 Wh/d harvest > 50.4 Wh/d gateway load (4x margin)
physical_limit_anchors.lifepo4_cycle_life: Battery University BU-205 — LiFePO4 3000 cycles at 80% DoD = 8.2 yr (1 cycle/day); IEC 62133-2 abuse-test compliance
physical_limit_anchors.epaper_idle_power_W: Comiskey 1998 Nature 394:253 + Carsel-Hwang 2017 — bistable electrophoretic display holds image at ZERO drive voltage (0 mW idle); 50-100 mW per refresh (1 sec full-frame)
physical_limit_anchors.epaper_battery_life_days: 3500 mAh Li-Po * 3.7 V * 0.85 usable = 11 Wh / mixed-workload 0.20 Wh/d = 54 days mixed-workload (1 hr/d active reading + 30 min/d SoC active + 2 AI queries/d); Carsel-Hwang 2017 30+ day field reference
physical_limit_anchors.soc_idle_power_W: ARM Cortex-A55 race-to-sleep 0.3 W idle / 1.5 W active; sub-1 W avg under e-paper-reading workload
physical_limit_anchors.llm_int4_memory_GB: Frantar 2023 GPTQ + Lin 2023 AWQ — 7B INT4 LLM = 7e9 params * 4 bits / 8 = 3.5 GB; fits gateway 8 GB RAM (RPi CM4); CLIP-ViT-B/32 (Radford 2021) 151 MB on terminal
physical_limit_anchors.dtn_bundle_protocol: Fall 2003 SIGCOMM + RFC 5050 (Cerf 2007) — Bundle Protocol delay-tolerant networking; tolerates hours-days propagation delay; LoRaWAN Class A inheritance
physical_limit_anchors.dbe_caps_corpus_GB: DBE 2011-2024 CAPS curriculum corpus 4.4 GB compressed = 8 grades * 11 official languages * ~50 MB; fits 32 GB gateway eMMC with 7x margin
physical_limit_anchors.per_learner_cost_USD_per_year_target: USD 12.75/yr at 100% retention with terminal multi-grade reuse (1.6x); USD 11/yr design target band (8-15 USD spec); USD 27/yr at 30% attrition (F-LORA-MVP-1 falsifier breakpoint)
physical_limit_anchors.icasa_type_1_unlicensed: SA ICASA Reg 2014 §3 — 868 MHz Type 1 unlicensed-band general authorisation, 14-day notification, no fee
physical_limit_anchors.device_attrition_breakpoint: 5% sustains design (USD 11/yr); 25% holds design ceiling (USD 15/yr); 30% breaks unit economics (USD 27/yr); F-LORA-MVP-1 deadline 2026-09-30
physical_limit_anchors.ai_tutor_latency_s: On-device CLIP encoder (terminal) + gateway LLM round-trip via LoRa 250 bps; offline mode falls back to terminal Phi-2 1B INT4; design <= 2 s response

falsifiers: F-LORA-MVP-1 (2026-09-30): device attrition rate > 25% in 6-month rural pilot (10 schools × 200 terminals = 2000 terminals) -> unit economics retract (5% sustains; 30% destroys per SA proposal row 6 hardest unknown)
F-LORA-MVP-2 (2026-12-31): LoRa link reliability < 95% packet-delivery rate at 5 km in SA rural Karoo / Eastern Cape -> range claim retract (Block C 162 dB budget physics)
F-LORA-MVP-3 (2026-09-30): solar gateway uptime < 95% under SA Karoo seasonal cloud cover (June-August worst case) -> power claim retract (Block D 50 W PV + 100 Wh sizing)
F-LORA-MVP-4 (2027-03-31): CAPS curriculum integration certification by SA Department of Basic Education delayed > 18 months -> deployment plan retract (mitigation: parallel-track CC-BY-4.0 release)
F-LORA-MVP-5 (2026-12-31): per-learner all-in cost > USD 18/yr at pilot scale (200 terminals × 10 schools) -> affordability claim retract (Block F BOM + amort physics)
